changelog: - Implemented opt-in Auto-Save toggle checkbox in Manage Backups modal
- Added 'Auto-Save Disabled' status dot (gray indicator) to sync badge
- Protected startup redirection from cloud files to local copies without auto-generating disk files
- Fixed AI Script Analysis crash issues and bottom panel report spacing constraints
- Refactored Developer Hub to deploy release assets directly to GitHub instead of Google Drive
- Added secure, password-masked GitHub PAT configuration in Developer Hub
- Implemented 'Git Push Code Only' to sync repository source code changes
- Restricted Release deployments to only stage and push version.json and installer binaries
- Added live Git subprocess log streaming to the Developer Hub terminal GUI
- Added Character List interface for current and new Characters
